requirement_topic.en: Conformity Assessment — UNBS PVoC, Certificate of Conformity, and Q-Mark
requirement_topic.zh: 合格评定——UNBS出口前核验、合格证与Q标
requirement_topic.zht: 合格評定——UNBS出口前核驗、合格證與Q標

summary.en: UNBS applies a mandatory conformity pathway for PPE respirators through Pre-Export Verification of Conformity and consignment-based import controls. Before release for Uganda entry, the exporter and Uganda importer must complete the PVoC process for the exact model, obtain a valid UNBS Certificate of Conformity (CoC), and demonstrate readiness for customs release via the chosen route. The Q-Mark requirement is part of UNBS quality control expectations for regulated imports, and clearance is typically processed through the Mombasa or Dar es Salaam channels for landlocked Uganda shipments.
summary.zh: UNBS对PPE口罩实施强制性合格路径，要求通过出口前一致性核验（PVoC）及按批次进口控制。产品进入乌干达前，出口商与乌干达进口商必须完成该型号的PVoC流程、取得UNBS合格证（CoC），并配合清关所需资料。Q标是UNBS对受控进口产品的质量控制要求之一，乌干达因内陆国家通常通过蒙巴萨或达累斯萨拉姆渠道转运完成口岸处理。
summary.zht: UNBS對PPE口罩實施強制性合格路徑，要求透過出口前一致性核驗（PVoC）及按批次進口控制。產品進入烏干達前，出口商與烏干達進口商必須完成該型號的PVoC流程、取得UNBS合格證（CoC），並配合清關所需資料。Q標是UNBS對受控進口產品的質量控制要求之一，烏干達因內陸國家通常透過蒙巴薩或達累斯薩拉姆渠道轉運完成口岸處理。

standards_or_laws: UNBS Conformity and Certification Guidelines (PVoC to Standards)
Uganda import control requirements for regulated PPE through UNBS
Q-Mark quality-mark guidance for selected regulated categories

summary.en: China typically uses GB 2626-2019 and GB 19083-2010 with CNCA-administered CCC or NMPA medical-device filings at factory and product levels. These are domestic mandatory systems and are not equivalent to Uganda consignment-level UNBS PVoC and CoC requirements before Uganda release, nor to Q-Mark placement expectations.
summary.zh: 中国通常以GB 2626-2019和GB 19083-2010为基础，结合CNCA管理的CCC以及NMPA医疗器械备案/注册实现国内合规。该路径属于国内型式与出厂层面的强制制度，不等同于乌干达进口前按批次的UNBS PVoC与CoC要求，也不替代Q标展示要求。
summary.zht: 中國通常以GB 2626-2019和GB 19083-2010為基礎，結合CNCA管理的CCC以及NMPA醫療器械備案/註冊實現國內合規。該路徑屬於國內型式與出廠層面的強制制度，不等同於烏干達進口前按批次的UNBS PVoC與CoC要求，也不替代Q標展示要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 2626-2019 — Respiratory protective equipment technical baseline in China
GB 19083-2010 — Medical-protective mask baseline in China
CCC and NMPA filing systems under Chinese supervision

gap.en: A common gap is assuming that CNAS and CCC paperwork is sufficient for Uganda release. For Uganda entry, gap closure requires an Uganda consignment CoC, importer-linked customs routing documentation, evidence of UNBS PVoC outcome, and Q-Mark coverage where required by product category. Without this, release teams at transit channels usually block shipment.
gap.zh: 常见差距是误将CNAS和CCC文件视为乌干达放行材料。乌干达清关必须补齐批次合格证、与进口商挂钩的清关文书、UNBS PVoC结果及必要类别下的Q标覆盖，否则在转运/清关环节通常会被拦截。
gap.zht: 常見差距是誤將CNAS和CCC文件視為烏干達放行材料。烏干達清關必須補齊批次合格證、與進口商掛鉤的清關文書、UNBS PVoC結果及必要類別下的Q標覆蓋，否則在轉運／清關環節通常會被攔截。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UNBS PVoC, per-shipment Certificate of Conformity, and Q-Mark readiness documentation are required before customs release in Uganda channels.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 2626 or GB 19083 domestic compliance and CCC/NMPA pathways apply inside China but do not by themselves meet Uganda import release requirements.

source.publisher: UNBS official portals and published certification notices

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Uganda, Chinese CNAS, CCC, or NMPA paperwork is not a replacement for UNBS consignment-level PVoC and Certificate of Conformity requirements. Exporters need importer-linked documentation and Q-Mark alignment before release through Mombasa or Dar es Salaam.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对乌干达而言，中国CNAS、CCC或NMPA文件不能替代UNBS的按批次PVoC与合格证要求。出口商须提供与进口商关联的文件链并完成Q标对接，才能通过蒙巴萨或达累斯萨拉姆渠道放行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對烏干達而言，中國CNAS、CCC或NMPA文件不能替代UNBS的按批次PVoC與合格證要求。出口商須提供與進口商關聯的文件鏈並完成Q標對接，才能透過蒙巴薩或達累斯薩拉姆渠道放行。
